channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: E. Jean Carroll Attorneys Say 'Time for Him to Pay' After SCOTUS Rejects Trump Appeal
item.description: The U.S. Supreme Court this week, with no dissents, declined to hear President Donald Trump's appeal of the verdict and judgment.

item.title: Victor Willis, Village People lead singer, dies at 74
item.description: Victor Willis, lead singer of the disco group Village People, whose hit "Y.M.C.A." became a fixture at rallies for President Trump, has died at the age of 74.

item.title: Victor Willis, Village People lead singer, dies at 74
item.description: Willis died after a short but aggressive illness, his family said.

item.title: Phil Weiser projected to win Democratic primary for Colorado governor
item.description: Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser is projected to win the Democratic primary for governor, according to the Associated Press.
